description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular shape and a sunken stem cavity at the top. Its skin is predominantly a mix of red and yellow hues, with some areas showing a gradient between the two. One side of the apple displays significant bruising and discoloration, while another side has a large, deep gash exposing the inner flesh. The surface appears semi-glossy but is marred by blemishes and rough patches, especially around the damaged areas. The apple's overall appearance suggests it is overripe and has suffered from physical impact or decay. No stickers or labels are visible on its surface.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with bruises and a deep gash, showing signs of overripe decay.
description_view_0: Mostly intact red-yellow apple with a sunken stem cavity and minor blemishes.
description_view_1: Side with extensive bruising and discoloration, skin appears rougher and more damaged.
description_view_2: Large, deep gash exposing the inner flesh, with wrinkled and decayed skin.
description_view_3: Visible deep cut running along the side, with more pronounced surface damage.
